name: Lawrence, Paul R
title: Deputy Secretary

transactions.description: Fidelity Software and IT Services Portfolio (FSCSX)
T Rowe Price Health Sciences Fund, Inc Class I Shares (THISX)

summary: Lawrence reported 3 sales estimated at $98K between April 22, 2025 and May 8, 2025. The sales covered Dominion Energy (D), a Fidelity software fund (FSCSX) and a T. Rowe Price health sciences fund (THISX). None of the transactions were flagged as filed late.
